impact: The infra stack imports the pure secret contract from src/lib. It works today because the module is type/pure-data only, but it couples CDK synthesis to the app source tree and could accidentally pull app-only dependencies into infra builds if the contract grows. Consider moving shared infra/app contracts to a neutral package or shared directory.
resolution: Moved the pure secret contract into shared/secrets/contracts.ts, kept src/lib/secrets/contracts.ts as an app compatibility re-export, and updated the CDK stack to import the neutral shared module with a regression test guarding against src/lib imports.
title: CDK imports secret contract from app source tree
